heading: Disposition of property
label: 5012 Disposition of property
text: The Secretary shall dispose of any United States property held by the International North Pacific Fisheries Commission on the date of its termination in a manner that would further the purposes of this chapter.
notes: CodificationTitle VIII of and enacted identical sections. Title VIII of was repealed by .Pub. L. 102–567Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 106–562
